description: A customer wants to book a trip with three legs: Dallas to Denver, then Denver to Seattle, then Seattle back to Dallas.

nodes.task_description: Search for flights for each of the three individual legs of the journey.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds available flights for all three legs.

nodes.task_description: Combine the selected flights into a single multi-city booking.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates one booking containing all three flights.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total price, process payment, and issue the ticket for the entire itinerary.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the booking and ticketing process.
